_comment: Job Scout watchlist configuration. Customize keywords, screening criteria, and target companies for your search.

screening._comment: All keyword lists are optional. Leave empty or remove any that don't apply to your search. Use disabled_signals to turn off entire signal categories.
screening._disabled_signals_options: Available: Remote, Comp, Level, Builder, AI, TechDepth. Example: ["AI", "TechDepth"] to skip those checks.
screening._senior_keywords_comment: Title keywords that signal the RIGHT level for you. Examples: director, senior, lead, manager, vp, entry level, junior, mid-level. Depends on what YOU are targeting.
screening._level_exclude_comment: Title keywords that signal the WRONG level. Examples: intern, coordinator, associate, junior, chief, c-suite. Depends on what you want to filter OUT.
screening._builder_keywords_comment: Keywords for hands-on/building roles. Examples: build, architect, design, implement, create, develop, engineer, automate. Leave empty if not relevant.
screening._operator_keywords_comment: Keywords for operational/management roles. Examples: manage campaigns, forecast, territory, quota, demand gen, content calendar. Leave empty if not relevant.
screening._ai_keywords_comment: Keywords signaling AI/tech relevance. Examples: ai, machine learning, llm, automation, agent. Leave empty if AI relevance doesn't matter to you.
screening._deep_eng_keywords_comment: Red-flag keywords for roles that are too deeply technical. Examples: kubernetes, terraform, docker, sre. Leave empty if not applicable.
